id.description: Client-specified menu identifier. Used for deduplication and reference.

name.description: Display name of the menu (e.g., 'Dinner Menu', 'Wine List', 'Brunch Specials').

description.description: Description of the menu, its theme, or when it's available (e.g., 'Served Tuesday through Saturday, 5pm-10pm').

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for all item prices in this menu (e.g., 'USD', 'GBP').

ordinal.description: Display order for this menu relative to other menus at the restaurant. Lower values appear first.

groups.description: Array of menu group objects, each containing a name, description, ordinal, and nested items array. Groups represent sections like 'Appetizers', 'Entrees', etc.

MenuPayload.description: Input structure for creating/pushing a menu. Contains the menu definition with nested groups and items.

CountryCode.description: Two-letter ISO 3166-1 country code of the diner's location (e.g., 'US', 'GB').

CustomerNickname.description: Display name chosen by the diner for their review. Not necessarily their real name.

Featured.description: Whether this review has been featured/highlighted by the restaurant or platform.

Locale.description: BCP 47 locale of the review content (e.g., 'en-US').

Language.description: Two-letter language code of the review text (e.g., 'en', 'fr', 'es').

ModerationState.description: Detailed moderation status: 'pending' (awaiting review), 'approved' (visible to public), 'rejected' (hidden due to policy violation), 'flagged' (under manual review).

SimplifiedModerationState.description: Consumer-friendly moderation status: 'live' (visible), 'pending' (under review), 'removed' (not visible). Simplified from the full ModerationState.

Rating.description: Object containing overall rating (1-5) and sub-ratings: food, service, ambiance, and value. Each on a 1-5 scale.

Recommended.description: Whether the diner would recommend this restaurant to others. Boolean derived from their overall rating and feedback.

RestaurantId.description: Restaurant ID (rid) this review is associated with.

DinedDateTime.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the diner's reservation was scheduled (the date they dined, not when they wrote the review).

ReviewId.description: Unique review identifier (UUID). Used in the reply endpoint path.

ReviewText.description: Full text body of the review written by the diner.

ReviewTitle.description: Title/headline of the review chosen by the diner.

ReviewType.description: Type classification of the review: 'diner' (standard post-visit review), 'experience' (review specific to a dining experience).

SubmissionDateTimeUtc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the review was submitted by the diner.

Helpfulness.description: Object containing helpfulness voting data: upvotes, downvotes, and net score from other diners rating the review's usefulness.

IsDraft.description: Whether this review is still in draft state (partially completed by the diner). Drafts are not publicly visible.

Categories.description: Array of category tags the diner selected to describe their experience (e.g., 'Good for Groups', 'Romantic', 'Special Occasion').

DinerInitials.description: Two-character initials of the diner (e.g., 'JD') for anonymous avatar display.

DinerMetroId.description: Numeric metro area identifier for the diner's location. Used for geographic analytics.

DinerIsVip.description: Whether the diner has VIP status on the platform (high engagement, many reviews, etc.). VIP reviews may be weighted differently.

Photos.description: Array of photo objects uploaded by the diner with their review. Each photo has a URL, thumbnail URL, and optional caption.

Review.description: A diner review submitted after a completed reservation, including ratings, text, moderation state, and optional photos.

id.description: Unique webhook subscription identifier (UUID). Used in update and delete endpoint paths.

restaurant_id.description: Restaurant ID (as string) this webhook is subscribed to events for.

partner_id.description: Partner identifier of the API client that created this webhook. Used for scoping webhook visibility.

url.description: HTTPS endpoint URL that receives POST requests when subscribed events occur. Must respond with 2xx within 10 seconds.

events.description: Array of event type strings this webhook is subscribed to (e.g., ['reservation.created', 'reservation.cancelled']). Only these events trigger delivery.

secret.description: HMAC-SHA256 signing secret for verifying webhook payload authenticity. Full value only shown at creation time; masked in subsequent reads.

active.description: Whether the webhook is currently active and receiving events. Automatically set to false after 5 consecutive delivery failures. Set to true to reactivate.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the webhook subscription was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent modification to the webhook configuration.

Webhook.description: Webhook subscription configuration for receiving real-time event notifications at an HTTPS endpoint.

Rating.description: Rating breakdown. Overall is required; sub-ratings are optional.

DinedDateTime.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the diner visited. Defaults to current time if omitted.

Recommended.description: Whether the diner recommends this restaurant.

Language.description: Two-letter language code of the review text.

DinerInitials.description: Diner's initials for avatar display. Auto-derived from CustomerNickname if omitted.

ReservationId.description: Associated reservation ID, if the review is linked to a specific booking.

Active.description: True if the member has accepted their invite.
